response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a senior software developer with a strong background in C++ (e.g., National Instruments, Altom Consulting) and other languages, but his recent roles at Google and Meta primarily involve TypeScript, Node.js, and React. While he meets the experience requirement (8+ years) and has relevant skills like C++ and architecture design, his lack of recent C++ or industrial automation experience, combined with minimal exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) or cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), raises concerns about his fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience with embedded and real-time systems (National Instruments, Altom Consulting)
Proven architecture and system design skills (Google, Meta, open-source projects)
Experience with performance-critical applications and concurrent programming (Meta, Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited recent C++ development, with focus on JavaScript/TypeScript in top roles (Google, Meta)
No evident experience with industrial automation, IoT, or relevant protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Minimal exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) or cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1)
